content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative feedback loop can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-improvement framework that still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data. This framework would first generate multiple conflicting draft outputs from different problem-solving perspectives, then run iterative Self-Refine refinement on each draft before aggregating the best components of each refined output.
